'''Bongo Lasers''' were variants of the [[Tribubble bongo/Legends|Tribubble bongo]] and were used as [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyers]] in the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. They were armed with a panel of [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] for anti-ship duty in the front of the vessel, and they had a similar crescent-shaped appearance to the Tribubble bongo, and were [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by two individuals in separate cockpits. [[Bongo (disambiguation)|Bongo]] Lasers were driven by one propeller and constructed at [[Shipyard (water)|shipyards]] by the [[Bongomeken Collective]] for a cost of 100 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] and 25 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]]. The Bongo Lasers could be upgraded to the stronger [[Bongo Laser|Bongo Fast Lasers]]. They were first used around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3000 BBY]] during the [[War of the Gungan tribes]] in the [[Raid on Spearhead]]. Over three-thousand years later, they saw action against the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|occupation]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Behind the scenes==
Bongo Lasers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are the Gungan destroyer units.

*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
